name: bookends-research-skill
description: Bookends Research Skill — reproduces the Priapism deep-linked Bookends report pipeline for ANY topic (topic is the only variable): a new Bookends group with topic-appropriate subtopic child groups, authoritative sources via Firecrawl/PubMed, full-text (or flagged abstract-only) PDFs attached to references, one persistent highlight + page-accurate bookends:// deep link per source, and ONE combined styled HTML report (executive summary; per-article cards with inline highlighted deep-linked quotes; stance/source-type table; navigable narrative synthesis; Word-ready Academic Summary; References in Vancouver style). Saved into Bookends (Reports subgroup, label = AI content) and to iCloud.
